product_name: Fra-Ber Gommanera Lastik Parlatıcı (1:5 Konsantre) - 5 kg

sources.cleaned_content:
# Gommanera Superlux

Solvent-based brightener for ultra-glossy wet look effect

Gommanera Superlux is Fra-Ber's top-of-the-range professional polishing treatment, solvent-based, designed for those who want a powerful and high-impact visual effect. Its formula generates an intense, scenic and artificial wet look, superior to the natural shine of rubber. Creates a water-repellent and durable film that lasts up to 3-4 weeks even after repeated washes. It can also be applied to external fascias and plastics to even out the look and enhance every detail.

The main features:

- Extreme "Wet look" effect, with artificial and scenic brilliance.
- Solvent-based formula with high adhesion and durability.
- Up to 3-4 weeks of storage even after washing.
- Applicable on external rubbers, fascias and plastics.
- Ideal for high-end finishes or "show cars".

![image](https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/gommanera-superlux-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg)

#### Formats and article codes

- Format: 5 L - Item Code: 75138
- Format: 25 L - Item Code: 75140
